title: Automate AI Workflows with n8n
modules: n8n's Execution Model: Nodes, Triggers, and Data Flow Fundamentals
Integrating LLMs: Connecting OpenAI, Anthropic, and Local Models to Workflows
Building Intelligent Pipelines: Conditional Logic, Branching, and Error Handling
Working with External Data: APIs, Databases, Webhooks, and File Ingestion
Automating Real Work: Email Triage, Report Generation, and Document Processing
Human-in-the-Loop Design: When and How to Insert Approval Steps
Apply It: Map and Automate a Repetitive Workflow from Your Own Role
Self-Hosting, Security Considerations, and Scaling n8n in an Organization
synopsis: n8n gives professionals a visual, code-optional environment to wire AI models into real business workflows — without surrendering control to opaque SaaS products. This course teaches you to design robust, production-grade automation pipelines that combine LLMs with the systems your organization already uses.
rationale: Workflow automation is the highest-leverage AI application for most working professionals, yet the tooling — particularly open-source options like n8n — remains poorly understood outside developer circles, leaving significant productivity gains on the table.
learning_outcome: Professionals can design and deploy a working n8n automation pipeline that integrates one or more AI models into a recurring task or business process within their own organization.
nearest_existing: The Four Signals of AI-Native Opportunity
